text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #3)

I should have referenced LLD instead=-of/in-addition-to to lldb: I.e.,

If lld (or lldb or any of the others) do not really make sense for devel/llvm37 it might be good for it/them to not have the option(s) be selectable.
